HBAR.macroLabel: GW3 — W1 in progress, sub-i actief (early stages)
HBAR.bias: bullish (W1 van GW3 net begonnen, vroege fase)
HBAR.headline: Grand Wave: GW1 2021 $0.58 → GW2 2024 $0.03 → GW3 lopend naar $15.99 → GW5 $155.91 ultimate. Currently W1 van GW3 (sub-i in progress).
HBAR.vsDashboard: ALIGNED met DD's W3/sub-i framing. Dashboard targets uitgebreid met GW5 ultimate $155.91.
HBAR.lastQuote: We can see the early stages of forming the Sub-wave 3 of the Grand Wave 3, targeting $15 levels.

XRP.macroLabel: W5 van W1 van GW3 — W4 ABC voltooid @ $1.31, sub-i in progress
XRP.bias: bullish (W5 expansion onderweg binnen W1 van GW3)
XRP.headline: Grand Wave: GW1 2018 → GW2 2022 $0.30 → GW3 actief. Binnen GW3: W1 richting $18.23. Binnen W1: W4 ABC voltooid @ $1.31, W5 start naar $5.86.
XRP.vsDashboard: ALIGNED met DD's W5 framing. Dashboard W5/sub-i = W5 van W1 van GW3. Dashboard 2.0 ext $8.24 valt tussen W5 top $5.86 en W1 top $18.23.
XRP.lastQuote: Monthly structure shows a completed corrective phase (ABC). Price is holding above the major base after Wave 4. The current move aligns with the early stages of a potential Wave 5 expansion. Major upside remains open toward the 261.80% Fib level at the $5.8563+ level.

macroOverride.phaseLabel: W5 van W1 van GW3 — naar $5.86 → $18.23 → ultimately $1,043+
